text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 319 

PRE_ICL_INNPP_COPAY_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL In-Network Non-Preferred Pharmacy Copay for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a 1-month supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using an in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy within 
a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL)
